recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: The Last Summer
recommendations.overview: Standing on the precipice of adulthood, a group of friends navigate new relationships, while reexamining others, during their final summer before college.

recommendations.title: Godland
recommendations.overview: In the late 19th century, a young Danish priest travels to a remote part of Iceland to build a church and photograph its people. But the deeper he goes into the unforgiving landscape, the more he strays from his purpose, the mission and morality.

recommendations.title: Falcon Lake
recommendations.overview: A shy teenager on a summer vacation experiences the joy and pain of young adulthood when he forges an unlikely bond with an older girl.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: Metalhead
recommendations.overview: A young girl in 1990s Iceland is caught between the life that took her brother and her own inability to strike out on her own. In her grief, she finds solace in metal and dreams of making her own music.

recommendations.title: Bilitis
recommendations.overview: A coming of age story centering on the exploits of a young girl during summer vacation.

recommendations.title: How to Have Sex
recommendations.overview: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday—drinking, clubbing and hooking up, in what should be the best summer of their lives.

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: Noi the Albino
recommendations.overview: 17 year old Nói drifts through life on a remote fjord in Iceland. In winter, the fjord is cut off from the outside world, surrounded by ominous mountains and buried under a shroud of snow. Nói dreams of escaping from this white-walled prison with Íri
